tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdclientsGet
tools.description: Get information about one of the ad clients in the specified publisher's AdSense account.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdclientsList
tools.description: List all hosted ad clients in the specified hosted account.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdunitsDelete
tools.description: Delete the specified ad unit from the specified publisher AdSense account.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdunitsGet
tools.description: Get the specified host ad unit in this AdSense account.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdunitsGetAdCode
tools.description: Get ad code for the specified ad unit, attaching the specified host custom channels.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdunitsInsert
tools.description: Insert the supplied ad unit into the specified publisher AdSense account.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdunitsList
tools.description: List all ad units in the specified publisher's AdSense account.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdunitsPatch
tools.description: Update the supplied ad unit in the specified publisher AdSense account. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsAdunitsUpdate
tools.description: Update the supplied ad unit in the specified publisher AdSense account.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsGet
tools.description: Get information about the selected associated AdSense account.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsList
tools.description: List hosted accounts associated with this AdSense account by ad client id.

tools.name: accounts.adsensehostAccountsReportsGenerate
tools.description: Generate an AdSense report based on the report request sent in the query parameters. Returns the result as JSON; to retrieve output in CSV format specify "alt=csv" as a query parameter.

tools.name: adclients.adsensehostAdclientsGet
tools.description: Get information about one of the ad clients in the Host AdSense account.

tools.name: adclients.adsensehostAdclientsList
tools.description: List all host ad clients in this AdSense account.

tools.name: associationsessions.adsensehostAssociationsessionsStart
tools.description: Create an association session for initiating an association with an AdSense user.

tools.name: associationsessions.adsensehostAssociationsessionsVerify
tools.description: Verify an association session after the association callback returns from AdSense signup.

tools.name: customchannels.adsensehostCustomchannelsDelete
tools.description: Delete a specific custom channel from the host AdSense account.

tools.name: customchannels.adsensehostCustomchannelsGet
tools.description: Get a specific custom channel from the host AdSense account.

tools.name: customchannels.adsensehostCustomchannelsInsert
tools.description: Add a new custom channel to the host AdSense account.

tools.name: customchannels.adsensehostCustomchannelsList
tools.description: List all host custom channels in this AdSense account.

tools.name: customchannels.adsensehostCustomchannelsPatch
tools.description: Update a custom channel in the host AdSense account. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: customchannels.adsensehostCustomchannelsUpdate
tools.description: Update a custom channel in the host AdSense account.

tools.name: reports.adsensehostReportsGenerate
tools.description: Generate an AdSense report based on the report request sent in the query parameters. Returns the result as JSON; to retrieve output in CSV format specify "alt=csv" as a query parameter.

tools.name: urlchannels.adsensehostUrlchannelsDelete
tools.description: Delete a URL channel from the host AdSense account.

tools.name: urlchannels.adsensehostUrlchannelsInsert
tools.description: Add a new URL channel to the host AdSense account.

tools.name: urlchannels.adsensehostUrlchannelsList
tools.description: List all host URL channels in the host AdSense account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
